hero_cards.name: Aragorn
hero_cards.power: Return one played attack card to your hand.

hero_cards.name: Legolas
hero_cards.power: Add one attack card regardless of rank (play with card).

hero_cards.name: Frodo
hero_cards.power: Disable trump suit for one round.

hero_cards.name: Boromir
hero_cards.power: Auto-defend one attack; attacker discards one random card.

hero_cards.name: Nazgul
hero_cards.power: Defender may use only trump cards (standalone).

hero_cards.name: Saruman
hero_cards.power: Exchange one card with defender’s highest or trump card (start of round).

hero_cards.name: Balrog
hero_cards.power: Inflict one wound even if fully defended (end of round, play with card).

hero_cards.name: Gollum
hero_cards.power: Defender may redefine trump for one round.

hero_cards.name: Wormtongue
hero_cards.power: Name a suit; defender cannot play that suit this round.
